name: deepplanning-long-horizon
description: Benchmark and evaluate long-horizon agent planning with verifiable constraints. Multi-day travel planning, combinatorial shopping optimization. Proactive information acquisition, local constrained reasoning, global optimization. Frontier LLMs struggle here. Explicit reasoning patterns. Parallel tool use trade-offs.
paperTitle: DeepPlanning: Benchmarking Long-Horizon Agentic Planning with Verifiable Constraints
